decision_id.description: The decision_id returned by a prior /v1-evaluate call.

action.description: Optional cross-check — re-state the action. May be empty.

agent.description: Optional cross-check — re-state the agent. May be empty.

context.description: Optional cross-check — re-state the context. May be empty.

api_key.description: API key echoed in the body. Also sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>.
